comment: Nationwide state-mechanics rules driven by states-index flags, plus the federal HOEPA baseline that all state high-cost tests sit on.

rules.description: Federal HOEPA §32 high-cost baseline: first-lien APR spread over APOR above 6.5 points makes the loan high-cost and not GSE-deliverable - not originated under this program
rules.citation: 15 U.S.C. §1639 / 12 CFR 1026.32; GSE ineligibility for HOEPA loans

rules.description: Community property states: a married borrower whose spouse is not on the loan requires the non-borrowing spouse to sign the security instrument, right of rescission, and TIL to perfect the lien (no DTI impact for conventional loans)
rules.citation: Community property law of AZ/CA/ID/LA/NV/NM/TX/WA/WI; marital signature requirements

artifact_always.text_template: Non-borrowing spouse must sign the security instrument, right of rescission, and TIL disclosure (community property state).

rules.description: Dry-funding state: funds disburse after closing once all conditions verified - all prior-to-funding conditions must clear before disbursement

artifact_always.text_template: Dry-funding state: all prior-to-funding conditions must be cleared and documents reviewed before disbursement.

rules.description: Attorney-closing state: closing documents must be prepared or reviewed by a licensed attorney

artifact_always.text_template: Attorney-closing state: closing package must be prepared/reviewed by a licensed attorney; provide attorney/title opinion.
